heading: Number of justices; quorum
label: 1 Number of justices; quorum
text: The Supreme Court of the United States shall consist of a Chief Justice of the United States and eight associate justices, any six of whom shall constitute a quorum.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 321 (, ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 21536 Stat. 1152Appointment of “judges of the Supreme Court” by the President by and with the advice and consent of the Senate is provided by U.S. Constitution art. 2, § 2, cl. 2.
